testcase.name: optional_task_failure_should_be_skipped_and_dependents_should_run()

failure.message: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Dependent C should have run despite optional failure in B ==> expected: <1> but was: <0>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Dependent C should have run despite optional failure in B ==> expected: <1> but was: <0> at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.build(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:158) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.buildAndThrow(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:139) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.failNotEqual(AssertEquals.java:201) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.assertEquals(AssertEquals.java:152) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals(Assertions.java:590) at app//io.tugrandsolutions.flowforge.workflow.OptionalFailurePropagationTest.lambda$optional_task_failure_should_be_skipped_and_dependents_should_run$0(OptionalFailurePropagationTest.java:54)
